home.title: TAROT DE PI
home.subtitle: Discover your destiny through the cards of tarot
home.placeholder: What do you wish to ask?...

pi_simple_5.name: 5-Card Spread
pi_simple_5.description: 5 cards revealing mind, roots, past, present, and future.

pi_rapida_3.name: Quick Reading
pi_rapida_3.description: 3 cards in a row: Past, Present, Future.

pi_sino_1.name: Yes or No
pi_sino_1.description: 1 single card for a direct answer.

reading.error: The Oracle is silent... energies are not flowing.

00-thefool.name: The Fool
00-thefool.info: Leap into the void. New beginnings with no fear or baggage.

01-themagician.name: The Magician
01-themagician.info: Absolute power. You have all the tools to manifest your reality.

02-thehighpriestess.name: The High Priestess
02-thehighpriestess.info: Pure intuition. Keep silent and listen to your inner voice.

03-theempress.name: The Empress
03-theempress.info: Abundance. Nature blooms and your projects bear fruit.

04-theemperor.name: The Emperor
04-theemperor.info: Control and structure. It is time to establish order and authority.

05-thehierophant.name: The Hierophant
05-thehierophant.info: Ancestral wisdom. Seek counsel in tradition and the sacred.

06-thelovers.name: The Lovers
06-thelovers.info: Crossroads. Choose with your heart, not your mind.

07-thechariot.name: The Chariot
07-thechariot.info: Victory. Advance with determination towards your goal without hesitation.

08-strength.name: Strength
08-strength.info: Inner courage. Tame your shadows with compassion and patience.

09-thehermit.name: The Hermit
09-thehermit.info: Retreat. Step away from the noise to find the light within.

10-wheeloffortune.name: Wheel of Fortune
10-wheeloffortune.info: Cycle change. Destiny turns; what goes down, must come up.

11-justice.name: Justice
11-justice.info: Balance. You reap exactly what you have sown.

12-thehangedman.name: The Hanged Man
12-thehangedman.info: Pause. Release control and look at the world from another perspective.

13-death.name: Death
13-death.info: Transformation. Cut ties with the old to make room for the new.

14-temperance.name: Temperance
14-temperance.info: Alchemy. Mix your energies calmly to find peace.

15-thedevil.name: The Devil
15-thedevil.info: Chains. Identify your attachments and break free from your own shadows.

16-thetower.name: The Tower
16-thetower.info: Rupture. False foundations crumble to free you from your prison.

17-thestar.name: The Star
17-thestar.info: Hope. The storm has passed; trust in destiny's guide.

18-themoon.name: The Moon
18-themoon.info: Mystery. Navigate your dreams and fears without losing your way.

19-thesun.name: The Sun
19-thesun.info: Total success. Light illuminates everything; celebrate your own vitality.

20-judgement.name: Judgement
20-judgement.info: Rebirth. Forgive the past and answer the call of your soul.

21-theworld.name: The World
21-theworld.info: Fulfillment. You have completed the journey; the universe is in harmony.
